description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bazel that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels any in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: build_direct and build_indirect. Both jobs should check out the repository with submodules, mount a bazel cache, install bazelisk, install Flex, Bison, and GMP, and then build using bazel. The build_direct job builds p4c directly, while the build_indirect job builds a 3rd party Bazel project depending on p4c as a subproject.
